Togethernet is a 13-year-old organizatio: Togethernet is a 13-year-old organization founded and run by committed students at Stockholm Science & Innovation School to create fun events for all students.
Sing your heart out at our karaoke sessi: Sing your heart out at our karaoke sessions. No talent required, just enthusiasm!
Relax and enjoy a film session with your: Relax and enjoy a film session with your fellow students.
From game tournaments to themed parties,: From game tournaments to themed parties, there're always things happening at our LAN-events.
QRTag is a digital version of the \"Kill: QRTag is a digital version of the "Killer Game" and a great way to meet other students at school.

<b>1 §</b> Alcohol and drugs are strictl: 1 § Alcohol and drugs are strictly prohibited during Togethernet. Whether they occur before or during. If we notice behavior that violates this, Togethernet will ask you to leave the premises immediately.
<b>2 §</b> If any fights or unpleasantne: 2 § If any fights or unpleasantness of e.g. racist, sexist, antisemitic or other offensive nature occur, Togethernet will ask you to leave the premises immediately. At Togethernet we have fun, it is no place for hate.
<b>3 §</b> Since Togethernet is located: 3 § Since Togethernet is located in SSIS premises, we also follow the school's core values. All etiquette rules that apply in school also apply during Togethernet.
<b>4 §</b> Togethernet as well as SSIS <: 4 § Togethernet as well as SSIS is a nut-free zone. People with acute nut allergies may be present at the event and with respect for them, we ask you not to bring anything with nuts in it. If you break this, we will confiscate the products containing nuts.
<b>5 §</b> We ask everyone participating: 5 § We ask everyone participating in Togethernet's events to treat each other with respect. Your belongings must therefore not disturb your neighbors, stay within your table space and behave yourself.
<b>6 §</b> It is not allowed to let in <: 6 § It is not allowed to let in non-SSIS students during any of our events. If you violate this, both you and the person let in will be asked to leave the premises immediately.
<b>7 §</b> Participants at Togethernet e: 7 § Participants at Togethernet events may under no circumstances destroy or attempt to sabotage any of the school's or other participants' material. If anyone is caught doing so, Togethernet will ask you to leave the premises.
<b>8 §</b> <b>No illegal activities</b>: 8 § No illegal activities are allowed via the network and if it occurs, the responsible person will be reported by the school.
<b>9 §</b> It is not allowed to plug <b>: 9 § It is not allowed to plug electronics into other sockets than those given at the placement without permission from Togethernet.
<b>10 §</b> It is not allowed to be in t: 10 § It is not allowed to be in the other part of the school which runs from the beginning of the staff room and forward without permission.
<b>11 §</b> Togethernet and teachers adm: 11 § Togethernet and teachers administer the event and their decisions are final.
<b>12 §</b> Violations of <b>§1, §2, §7,: 12 § Violations of §1, §2, §7, §8 and §11 will be reported to the principal.
<b>Togethernet reserves the right to cha: Togethernet reserves the right to change and possibly violate the rules above to the extent that it is reasonable.
login_restriction: If unchecked, only accounts from :hd can login.
